sandik.title: Crate Calculation Request
sandik.subtitle: Enter your product details and technical requirements; our expert team will prepare a custom crate quote within 1 business day.
sandik.free_note: This request is completely free and no payment is required.
sandik.section2_desc: External dimensions and gross weight of the product or load to be packaged.
sandik.crate_izgara_desc: Transport pallet with grid base structure
sandik.crate_vinc_desc: Crate with integrated crane lifting points
sandik.crate_endcap_desc: Wooden end cap for protecting product ends
sandik.crate_unknown_desc: Let a CNRWOOD expert recommend the best type
sandik.req_ispm15_desc: International wood packaging standard for export (fumigation / heat treatment)
sandik.req_forklift_desc: Space required for forklift tines at the base
sandik.req_crane_desc: Crane lifting points required on top of crate
sandik.material_placeholder: e.g. Machine parts, glass, sensitive electronics...
sandik.attachment_hint: You can upload PDF, image (JPG, PNG, WEBP), Word, Excel or ZIP files. Maximum 10 MB.
sandik.notes_placeholder: Special production requirements, delivery date, stacking needs or other details...
sandik.step1: Fill in and submit the form.
sandik.step2: Our expert team reviews your request.
sandik.step3: We contact you within 1 business day.
sandik.step4: A detailed written quote is presented to you.
sandik.free_desc: Submitting a calculation request requires no payment or commitment. You are completely free to review the quote before deciding.
sandik.kvkk: By submitting this form, you consent to CNR Ahşap processing your data solely for the purpose of evaluating this request, in accordance with applicable data protection regulations. Your data will not be shared with third parties.
services.title: Our Services
services.meta_desc: CNR Ahşap services: custom wooden crate production, ISPM 15 certified export packaging, pallet production, lumber & board supply, and wooden construction solutions.
services.subtitle: All the wooden solutions you need at every stage of your production process — under one roof.
services.item1_desc: Standard and custom-sized wooden crate manufacturing for heavy machinery, automotive, defence and electronics sectors.
services.item2_desc: Heat-treated (HT) wooden packaging and pallets compliant with ISPM 15 standard for international export.
services.item3_desc: Euro pallets, ISPM 15 pallets and custom-sized pallet production. Durable solutions for logistics and warehousing.
services.item4_desc: Reliable supply of pine, beech and mixed timber; OSB and other board products.
services.item5_desc: Turnkey production for restaurants, pergolas and architectural applications using CLT and custom wooden construction systems.
services.item6_desc: Custom crate calculation service based on your product dimensions and technical requirements.
services.cta_title: Let's Find the Right Service for You
services.cta_text: Share your project details and our expert team will prepare a custom quote.
about.title: About Us
about.meta_desc: Learn about CNR Ahşap — professional producer of wooden crates, export packaging, lumber & board and wooden construction projects in Gebze since 1998.
about.subtitle: CNR Ahşap has been guided by the principles of quality, reliability and sustainability in the wood processing industry since its founding in 1998.
about.founding_p1: CNR Ahşap started operations as a small workshop in Gebze in 1998. From the very first day, our dedication to woodworking craftsmanship and customer-focused approach helped us quickly establish a reputation as a trusted manufacturer.
about.founding_p2: Today we serve leading Turkish companies and international clients with export crates, ISPM 15 heat-treated packaging, lumber & board products and custom wooden construction projects.
about.mission_text: To package and protect our customers' products and projects in the safest, most efficient and internationally compliant manner — and to be Turkey's most trusted wooden solutions partner.
about.vision_text: To combine sustainable forest resources with modern production technologies and become the leader in wooden solutions in Turkey and a globally recognised brand.
about.value1_text: Quality control at every stage of production.
about.value2_text: Transparent partnership that keeps its word.
corporate.title: Corporate
corporate.meta_desc: CNR Ahşap has been operating in Gebze since 1998, sharing its deep expertise in wooden crates, export packaging, lumber & board and wooden construction projects.
corporate.subtitle: CNR Ahşap has been a reliable partner in wooden crates, ISPM 15 heat-treated packaging, lumber & board and wooden construction projects across Turkey and worldwide from its Gebze facility since 1998.
corporate.about_desc: Our company's founding story, values and areas of activity.
corporate.services_desc: An overview of the production and packaging solutions we offer.
corporate.products_desc: Browse our full product catalogue: crates, pallets, packaging.
corporate.cta_text: Share your needs with us and our expert team will offer the best solution.
cta.default_body: Contact the CNRWOOD team for wooden crate, packaging, lumber or construction needs. We respond within 1 business day.
footer.tagline: Professional production in wooden crates, export packaging, ISPM 15 heat-treated products, lumber & board and wooden construction projects since 1998.
